articles.title: Shiba Inu Credential Leak Could Have Led to “Theft, Token Embezzlement, Disruption of Services”
articles.description: The team behind Shiba Inu token (SHIBA) reportedly leaked its AWS credentials for more than two days in August. Shiba Inu quietly leaked key credentials last month.Security firm PingSafe published a report on September 8 detailing its findings. It said that on Aug. 22, it discovered that a commit in Shiba Inu's public GitHub repository displayed credentials related to the project's Amazon Web...

articles.title: LUNA’s price more than triples, pushing market cap near $1 billion
articles.description: While it's unclear what caused LUNA's spike, a researcher at The Block suggests that ATOM's pump earlier Friday morning could be connected.

articles.title: Tornado Cash used to launder $500,000 stolen from DAO Maker last year: security firms
